allow: PowerShell($j = Get-Content "c:\\Users\\aliha\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\MigrationFingerprint\\fingerprint_omni-zos-to-omni-linux_v1.0.0.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "top-level keys: " + \($j.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ', '\); "version: $\($j.version\)  status: $\($j.status\)"; "failure modes: $\($j.failure_modes.Count\)"; "detection rules: $\($j.detection_rules.Count\)"; "FM IDs: " + \(\($j.failure_modes | ForEach-Object id\) -join ', '\); "rule types: " + \(\($j.detection_rules | ForEach-Object type | Sort-Object -Unique\) -join ', '\); "modes with sample_defect: " + \(\($j.failure_modes | Where-Object { $_.sample_defect }\).Count\))
